metadata.description: AI enablement skills and prompts for development workflows

plugins.name: creating-prompts
plugins.description: Skills for creating new agent skills for Claude Code and VS Code Copilot

plugins.name: implement-workflow
plugins.description: End-to-end feature implementation workflow: understand a spec, design, build, test, self-review via a code-reviewer agent, then prep a PR. Bundles the implement, ready-to-push, review-pr, and suggest-pr skills plus a code-reviewer agent.
